name: Entropy Undone
descriptionTemplate: Ramona: Timeworn gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: When Ramona: Timeworn plays a card without triggering {Loop}, she gains 1 stack of {Negentropy} and gain [Arg2] Keyflare, up to 3 times per turn.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Ramona: Timeworn gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: After Ramona: Timeworn plays a card that does not trigger {Loop}, gain 1 stack of {Negentropy} and gain [Arg2] Keyflare. After playing a card that triggers {Loop}, gain 50 Keyflare.
